task1.title: Urban population growth
task1.prompt:
The diagram below shows the proportion of the population living in urban areas in different regions of the world.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.
task1.image_caption: Figure 1: Urban population as a percentage of total population by region

task2.title: Environmental responsibility
task2.prompt:
It is the responsibility of individuals, not governments or companies, to protect the environment.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
